assumptions.text: Source document is treated as the full authority for benchmark scope, and linked external references do not add behavior beyond the source.
Where the source states SHOULD-level guidance without explicit required artifacts or measurable constraints, it is not promoted to a hard invariant.

gaps.text: Unsupported normative guidance on comparison to other examples is treated as non-authoritative style guidance rather than a product invariant.
Framework-specific best-practice deviations are referenced but not concretely specified in a way that yields additional deterministic invariants.
The spec does not provide explicit numeric maxima for any field, so no MAX_VALUE invariants were extracted.

invariants.source_excerpt: When the page loads, the new-todo input is focused.
When the mark-all checkbox is unchecked, all todos become active.
Editing mode must not be persisted.
The implementation avoids Sass, CoffeeScript, or other preprocessors unless a reviewer records a framework-specific reason.
The implementation avoids Sass, CoffeeScript, or other preprocessors unless a reviewer records a framework-specific reason.
The app must work in every browser supported by the TodoMVC project.
invariants.text: RELATION_CONSTRAINT:expression=#main hidden when todo list empty <= empty todo list state

invariants.source_excerpt: When there are no todos, #main and #footer should be hidden.
invariants.text: RELATION_CONSTRAINT:expression=#footer hidden when todo list empty <= empty todo list state

invariants.source_excerpt: When the route changes, the todo list must be filtered at the model level, the selected class on filter links must be toggled, item updates in a filtered state must update visibility accordingly, and the active filter must persist on reload.
invariants.text: RELATION_CONSTRAINT:expression=active count <= number of active todos

invariants.source_excerpt: Given at least one todo is completed, when Clear completed is clicked, then completed todos are removed.
invariants.text: RELATION_CONSTRAINT:expression=selected class on filter link <= route state
RELATION_CONSTRAINT:expression=completed todos removed <= clear completed action
